meaning: adj.中性的,不及物的,(生物)无性的n.中性名词,无性动物,阉割动物
examples: The Polish word for 'window' is neuter.
Most Western languages have some form of distinction between masculine and feminine nouns, with some of them adding neuter nouns for good measure.
Animate beings are usually "non-neuter," while inanimate objects may be either neuter or non-neuter.
The German-based multinational is also keen to neuter the British jobs for British workers rhetoric.
Trial lawyers desperately want to neuter the Federal Arbitration Act, which sweeps all manner of litigation into its maw.
